landing.heroTitle: A sales platform that gets how Indonesia sells.
landing.heroSubtitle: One home for WhatsApp, email, Instagram, and marketplaces — with smart prospecting and multi-channel cadences, built for local B2B and B2C sales teams.
landing.heroNote: No credit card. The demo runs instantly.
landing.trustedBy: Trusted by sales teams across Indonesia
landing.featuresSubtitle: Six pillars that make selling in Indonesia faster and cleaner.
landing.compareSubtitle: Apollo's prospecting power, paired with a Mekari-style local channel stack.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start small, level up as your team grows. All prices per user / month.
landing.footerTagline: The WhatsApp-first sales intelligence platform for Indonesia.
landing.footerPdp: Compliant with PDP Law No. 27/2022. Your customer data is safe and encrypted.

features.multichannelDesc: WhatsApp, email, Instagram, and LinkedIn in one unified inbox.
features.prospectingDesc: Find and enrich Indonesian business leads with relevant data.
features.cadenceDesc: Sequence steps across channels with WIB working-hour scheduling.
features.pipelineDesc: Kanban deals in Rupiah, from prospect to close.
features.fieldDesc: GPS check-in, visit logs, and team routes straight from mobile.
features.complianceDesc: Consent logs, audit trails, and data controls banks love.
